name: Performance - LLMService.generate_response Throughput
description: Measures the throughput and latency of LLMService.generate_response for multiple requests.
input: Multiple async calls to LLMService.generate_response with valid prompts and context_chunks
output: Measured latency and throughput for LLM responses
success_criteria: All responses are returned within acceptable latency (e.g., < 5 seconds)
Trace logs record latency and token usage
